name: Dragon Miniature Set
description: Highly detailed dragon miniature set with 3 poses. Printed in metallic purple PLA with ultra-fine 0.1mm layer height for maximum detail. Perfect for tabletop RPGs, display shelves, or painting projects.

name: Modular Desk Organizer
description: Sleek, modular desk organizer with interchangeable compartments. Printed in matte white and cyan PETG for durability. Includes pen holder, phone stand slot, and small item tray.

name: Articulated Octopus
description: Adorable articulated octopus with fully movable tentacles. Printed in one piece with rainbow silk PLA — no assembly required! A mesmerizing fidget toy and conversation starter.

name: Custom Phone Stand
description: Minimalist phone stand with integrated cable management. Sleek geometric design holds your phone at the perfect viewing angle. Printed in matte black PETG for a premium look.

name: Cosplay Helmet — Warrior
description: Full-sized sci-fi warrior cosplay helmet. Printed in silver PLA, professionally sanded and painted with weathering effects. Wearable with padded interior for comfort at conventions.

name: Geometric Planter Set
description: Set of 3 geometric low-poly planters in different sizes. Printed in matte sage green PLA with drainage holes. Perfect for succulents, cacti, and small herbs. Adds a modern touch to any space.

name: Cable Management Clips
description: Pack of 12 adhesive-back cable management clips in assorted colors (cyan, purple, orange, white). Keep your desk cables organized and tangle-free. Fits cables from 3mm to 8mm diameter.

name: Medieval Dice Tower
description: Gothic castle-themed dice tower for tabletop gaming. Features detailed stone texture, small windows, and battlements. Hand-painted with stone wash effects. Ensures truly random dice rolls!
